name: Ochako and Najire | Choose the best
description:
"Hey, Hey, Which One Is Better?~"

Nejire Hado, also known as the Wonder Hero: Nejire Chan, was a student in Class 3-A at U.A. High School and was part of The Big 3. Following the Final War, Nejire graduates from U.A. High School and becomes a Pro Hero. Eight years later, she is the current No. 7 Pro Hero.

Ochaco Uraraka, also known as the Zero Gravity Hero: Uravity, is one of the main protagonists of My Hero Academia and was a student in Class 1-A at U.A. High School, training to become a Hero. Eight years after the Final War, Ochaco has graduated from U.A. High School as a Pro Hero alongside her classmates, and is the current No. 24 Hero.
